results.rendered_html:
puṣṭa p. p. [puṣ-kta]
1 Nourished, fed, reared, brought up.
2 Thriving, growing, strong, fat.
3 Tended, cared for.
4 Rich, magnificently provided.
5 Complete, perfect.
6 Full-sounding, loud.
7 Eminent.
— ṣṭaḥ N. of Viṣṇu.
— ṣṭaṃ
1 Nourishment.
2 Acquisition, gain (Ved.).
